name: CountUp.js — Scroll-Triggered Number Counter
description: Animates numbers from zero to their target value when they scroll into view. Add data-countup to any element containing a number.
body:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/countup.js@2.8.0/dist/countUp.umd.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    var elements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-countup]');
    var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
      entries.forEach(function(entry) {
        if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
        var el = entry.target;
        var raw = el.textContent.replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '');
        var suffix = el.getAttribute('data-countup-suffix') || el.textContent.replace(/[0-9.,]/g, '').trim();
        var decimals = (raw.indexOf('.') !== -1) ? raw.split('.')[1].length : 0;
        var cu = new countUp.CountUp(el, parseFloat(raw), { duration: 2, decimalPlaces: decimals, suffix: suffix, useEasing: true, enableScrollSpy: false });
        cu.start();
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.4 });
    elements.forEach(function(el) { observer.observe(el); });
  });
</script>
